name: Z L
reviewText:
I recently visited this "Roots the family salon" and I couldn’t be more impressed with the entire experience. From the moment I walked in, I felt welcomed by the friendly staff.  It’s clear that this place is focused on providing top-notch service and a relaxing experience.

I came in for haircut and Anikanth was absolutely amazing! He took the time to listen to my preferences and offered expert advice on what would work best for my hair type and face shape. I could tell he was highly skilled, and I felt completely confident in his hands. The end result was exactly what I wanted—and even better than I expected.

I found the prices to be very reasonable for the quality of service provided. They are definitely in line with other salons in the area, but the experience and results made it totally worth it.
I highly recommend this salon to anyone looking for a fantastic hairstyling experience.

name: Shakib ALi
reviewText: Visited this salon by Google it was a wonderful experince I ever had and I went along with. My sister for her haircut and facial & dandruff treatments. The way they gave service it was mind blowing and my sister hair cut and facial service was top notch. Mr Anikanth the owner handling the customer and giving the service what actually the customer need. It was amazing my Facial & hair cut was so impressive.liked the salon will definately visit and I also recommended this salon to everyone to have the experience.love u Roots Thank youuuuuu so much

name: Devarakonda Ashwini
reviewText:
I had an amazing experience at this Roots unisex salon. The stylists especially Anikanth was highly skilled and attentive, Listening to my preferences and providing expert advice. He worked wonders on my hair,Leaving me refreshed and confident.

Done my Hair Smoothening and facial it was awesome experience and loved it.

I Highly Recommended this Salon to anyone seeking a fantastic Grooming experience.

name: Divya Panjala
reviewText:
I’ve had a tattoo on my wrist done twice here, and both times the experience was excellent. Anikanth Kumar is very creative and enthusiastic. He really puts effort into his work and ensures customer satisfaction. Highly recommended. Anikanth Kumar is extremely active and passionate about his work. Very happy with the result and overall experience.

Great service and friendly atmosphere. ⭐

name: Sathvik Roshan
reviewText: The service is excellent and I got a haircut exactly as I wanted.

name: Lawte Shwetha
reviewText: Roots the family salon  is the best! They offer exceptional services for hair, skin, and tattoos all in one place. The staff is skilled, friendly, and professional. I’m thrilled with the results every time—whether it’s a new hairstyle, a skin treatment, or a tattoo. Highly recommend for anyone looking for top-notch care and artistry

name: Manasa Mahankali
reviewText: I was nervous about trying a new style, but Mr Anikanth Jadhav at Root's family saloon made me feel so comfortable. He is an artist! My hair looks healthier and more stylish than it has in years. I’ve already received so many compliments. Thank you for the incredible service!

name: Azlaan Pathan
reviewText: Very nice service. I m in from 2018 day by day their service and skills towards customer is increased to peaks. Well maintaining by Anikanth and ambience is superb. They does different styles and every time u come here they give different look. Love u Guys

reviewText: Today I visited with my family. It's an outstanding customer experience and hair services provided by Roots team.They also help us with suggestions and styles. It's a great to have such unisex saloon in our Tarnaka. Thanks again to Anikanth and his team.

reviewText: Roots The Family Salon is the best!!!! It's an outstanding customer experience and hair services provided by Roots team.They also help us with suggestions and styles. Very much happy satisfied with the outcome.Thanks again to Anikanth Sir and his team.

reviewText: I recently had my haircut at Roots, and I must say, Mr. Anikanth did an outstanding job. The staff demonstrated high professionalism and were adept at following instructions. I'd like to give a special shout-out to Sahil. True value for money.
